briefings.title: Wednesday Briefing - March 25
briefings.content:
## 🌅 Wednesday Briefing — March 25

**Crushers Week: Day 3 of 7** — Wednesday hoodie email fires at **10:30 AM** automatically. "The $69 hoodie that goes with everything 🔥" — no action needed.

**Kannon Beach 👀** — Lookbook sent March 23. No response yet. Follow up tomorrow or Friday if still silent. Hot lead — surf shop wholesale, Lawrencetown.

**Market Price Halifax 👀** — Wholesale pitch sent March 23. Streetwear boutique at Bishop's Landing. No response yet. Give it until end of week.

**Factory specs still MIA** — Boo, puffer jacket + hoodie sizing charts from China factory were expected yesterday. Once we have them: size charts go live on Shopify, wholesale catalog gets built.

**Next surf shop outreach** — Lawrencetown Surf Co (lawrencetownsurfco@gmail.com) and Rossignol are ready to go. Ben sends when ready.

**Brewery outreach pending** — Propeller, Big Spruce, Boxing Rock emails are drafted and waiting for Boo to send.

**Faire still needs install** — Ben installs the Faire Shopify app when at desktop. Opens up wholesale marketplace distribution.

**HST/GST accountant** — Still urgent. Over $30k threshold mid-2025 = potential back-filing exposure. Find someone before next tax season.

---

### 🎯 Top 3 Priorities Today
1. **Boo** — Send the 3 brewery outreach emails (Propeller, Big Spruce, Boxing Rock)
2. **Ben** — Install Faire Shopify app + send 8th Destination Hat image for lookbook
3. **Both** — Get Boo factory specs sent; find an accountant (one call or email = done)
